turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Reporting an Internet Outage at Your Housing

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, good morning. I would like to tell you about the Internet. It stopped working.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good morning! I'm sorry to hear that you're having trouble. Could you tell me if there are any specific error messages, or is the connection just not working at all?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I can still see the connection on my phone, but if I'm going through Facebook or surfing the internet, it's not loading.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I see, so it sounds like you're experiencing a connection issue. Let's try a couple of things. Have you tried restarting your router or modem?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, I have restarted it like 3 times or 4 times, but it's still not working.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it. Thanks for trying that. It might be a broader issue. Could you please confirm if other devices are also unable to connect, or is it just one device?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “It's about my phone and my laptop. My mom and my dad are not here now, so I cannot check if the device can connect or not.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Understood. It sounds like the issue might be with your network. I recommend contacting your Internet service provider for further assistance. They can check if there's an outage in your area. Would you like me to provide their contact details, or is there anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're welcome! If you need anything else, feel free to ask. Have a great day!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, can I ask about, is there a technician available today? Like, yeah.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Certainly! If you need a technician to visit, I can help schedule one for you. Could you please provide your address and a

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, because I'm really, like, busy and I have to do my deadline, my...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, I have to remember deadlines so that it's really good that you can sell someone really quickly.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I’ll do my best to assist you quickly. Could you please provide your address so I can check the earliest available appointment for a technician?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “There is 1-2-3-lambtang-2-2-9-9 in this URL.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you for the address. Let me check the earliest available technician appointment for you. Please hold on for a moment.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I ask that can you check if there's an outage in the area, like also other houses and other people cannot connect with the internet?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Certainly, let me check if there's an outage in your area. Please give me a moment.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “How are you there? How are you doing with your research?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you for your patience. I've checked and there is currently no outage reported in your area. We can proceed with scheduling a technician visit. Would you like the earliest available appointment, or do you have a preferred time?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “The first one, please, yeah, as quick as possible.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it. I'll schedule the technician for the earliest available slot today. You should receive a confirmation shortly. Is there anything else I can assist you with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So you have to try something before you send someone.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. Before the technician arrives, you can try a few troubleshooting steps: Check if the cables are securely connected to your modem/router. Restart your modem/router one more time. Try connecting with a different device if possible. If the issue persists, the technician visit will be helpful. Let me know if you need further assistance!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I should wait here when someone call me when they come.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely. The technician will contact you when they are on their way. You should receive a confirmation and an estimated time of arrival soon. If you have any other questions, feel free to reach out. Thank you for your patience!
